title: Halitum
description: this mod was inspired by avaritia, but it adds the most powerful armor and sword you will ever see in your life
body:
# 🌌Halitum Mod🌌

### This mod add 4 armors and 4 swords:

<details>
<summary>🟡Citrine Itens🟡</summary>
  
  ![Citrine Itens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99086385b5f03fdd5f2191ccbea5d206b328d5de.png)
 
**Non-Enriched Citrine:** Put on furnace to get real citrine

**Citrine:** The beginner mineral

**Citrine Armor:** Gives 30% of a real imortality to the player(Use only Forge Events on LivingDeathEvent, LivingHurtEvent, LivingDamageEvent, LivingTickEvent)

**Citrine Sword:** 30% of real forced damage and 50 of damage, this sword is unbreakable

</details>

<details>
<summary>🟣Morganite Itens🟣</summary>
  
![Morganite Itens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c3b3ac32bbec65f8011458e3ca0f28027da8a60.png)

**Essence of morganite:** used to craft morganite

**Morganite:** The veteran mineral

**Morganite Armor:** Gives 50% of a real imortality to the player(Forge Events on LivingDeathEvent, LivingHurtEvent, LivingDamageEvent, LivingTickEvent. Mixins on getHealth, setHealth, isDeadOrDying, isAlive, push, isPushable and hurt)

**Morganite Sword:** 40% of real forced damage and 200 of damage, this sword is unbreakable

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔵Turmalina Itens🔵</summary>
  
![Turmalina Itens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7ed4cedb62585a5fe83a830a769715f36de9f08.png)

**Essence of turmalina:** used to craft morganite

**Turmalina:** The veteran mineral

**Turmalina Armor:** Gives 75% of a real imortality to the player(Mixins on getHealth, setHealth, isDeadOrDying, isAlive, push, isPushable and hurt. ILaunchPluginService on isDeadOrDying, isAlive, attack, hurt, getHealth, getMaxHealth)

**Turmalina Sword:** 70% of real forced damage and Googolplex of damage, this sword is unbreakable

</details>

<details>
<summary>🌌The Dream Itens🌌</summary>
  
![The Dream Itens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2527d54f1fc8565fb18ac19becd117695701ef4.png)

**The Dream:** The veteran mineral

**The Dream Armor:** Gives 100% of a real imortality to the player(Mixins on getHealth, setHealth, isDeadOrDying, isAlive, push, isPushable, hurt and others 20 classes on minecaft managers(Transcient, Persistent, EntitySection, EntitySectionManger), java classes and ServerLevel, ClientLevel, ChunckMap and ClassInstanceMultimap Java Agent and retransformClasses on gethealth, getMaxHealth, isAlive and isDeadOrDying)

**The Dream Sword:** 100% of real forced damage and Googolplex of damage, this sword is unbreakable

</details>

### **CrativeTab:**

![Halitum CreativeTab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc8a6415bad351dd5d2394bbfd2448d782ae7c4d.png)
